action.reasoning: Observation: Best is ConvNeXt epoch 20 at 0.7558. CLIP at 50 epochs got 0.736. Time remaining: 1.32h. Analysis: ConvNeXt is better. Need to squeeze more performance. Key improvements: (1) combine train+val data, (2) use Symmetric Cross-Entropy loss which is more robust to label noise, (3) train ~25 epochs. With 50 epochs taking ~70min, 25 epochs should take ~35min leaving time for eval. Decision: Train ConvNeXt with SCE loss + combined data, submit best checkpoint.
